requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (GOST IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（GOST IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（GOST IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: For LED luminaires on the Armenian / EAEU market, photobiological safety is assessed against GOST IEC 62471 (the GOST adoption of IEC 62471: Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which classifies products into risk groups from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance limits. The photobiological risk-group classification supports the EAC safety assessment under the low-voltage / luminaire safety route (TR CU 004/2011 with GOST IEC 60598-1) and the supporting technical file. RG2 and RG3 products carry usage restrictions and must be documented; most general-purpose LED luminaires fall in RG0 or RG1 with no usage restriction, but the classification should be recorded in the technical file.
summary.zh: 对亚美尼亚／EAEU 市场的 LED 灯具，光生物安全依据 GOST IEC 62471（IEC 62471 的 GOST 采用版：灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评定，依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度限值将产品分为 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险）的危险组别。光生物危险组别分类支持低压／灯具安全路径（TR CU 004/2011 配合 GOST IEC 60598-1）下的 EAC 安全评定及配套技术文件。RG2 和 RG3 产品存在使用限制并须记录；大多数通用 LED 灯具属 RG0 或 RG1 且无使用限制，但分类结果应记录于技术文件中。
summary.zht: 對亞美尼亞／EAEU 市場的 LED 燈具，光生物安全依據 GOST IEC 62471（IEC 62471 的 GOST 採用版：燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評定，依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度限值將產品分為 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險）的危險組別。光生物危險組別分類支持低壓／燈具安全路徑（TR CU 004/2011 配合 GOST IEC 60598-1）下的 EAC 安全評定及配套技術文件。RG2 和 RG3 產品存在使用限制並須記錄；大多數通用 LED 燈具屬 RG0 或 RG1 且無使用限制，但分類結果應記錄於技術文件中。

standards_or_laws: GOST IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (GOST adoption of IEC 62471)
TR CU 004/2011 — applicable low-voltage / luminaire safety framework supporting the technical file

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires. Both the CN and EAEU adoptions trace to the same IEC 62471 base, so the risk-group methodology is consistent.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。中国与 EAEU 采用版均溯源于同一 IEC 62471 基础，故危险组别方法一致。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。中國與 EAEU 採用版均溯源於同一 IEC 62471 基礎，故危險組別方法一致。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard)

gap.en: GOST IEC 62471 and GB/T 20145 both trace to IEC 62471, so the risk-group methodology is consistent and a product assessed in China can usually be re-expressed in the EAEU framework without re-engineering. The gap is procedural: in Armenia the photobiological risk-group classification supports the EAC safety technical file, whereas CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and not routinely enforced for residential luminaires. Manufacturers exporting to Armenia should document a defensible risk-group assessment (commonly by testing to GOST IEC 62471) within the EAC technical file; RG2 luminaires need warnings and usage instructions, and RG3 products face significant restrictions. Testing should be acceptable within the EAEU accreditation system, and documentation is typically required in Russian.
gap.zh: GOST IEC 62471 与 GB/T 20145 均溯源于 IEC 62471，危险组别方法一致，在中国评定的产品通常可在 EAEU 框架内重新表述而无需重新工程设计。差距为程序性：在亚美尼亚，光生物危险组别分类支持 EAC 安全技术文件，而中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，对居民灯具并非日常执行。出口亚美尼亚的制造商应在 EAC 技术文件中记录可辩护的危险组别评估（通常按 GOST IEC 62471 检测）；RG2 灯具须附警告及使用说明，RG3 产品面临重大限制。检测须在 EAEU 认可体系内可被接受，文件通常须以俄文提供。
gap.zht: GOST IEC 62471 與 GB/T 20145 均溯源於 IEC 62471，危險組別方法一致，在中國評定的產品通常可在 EAEU 框架內重新表述而無需重新工程設計。差距為程序性：在亞美尼亞，光生物危險組別分類支持 EAC 安全技術文件，而中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，對居民燈具並非日常執行。出口亞美尼亞的製造商應在 EAC 技術文件中記錄可辯護的危險組別評估（通常按 GOST IEC 62471 檢測）；RG2 燈具須附警告及使用說明，RG3 產品面臨重大限制。檢測須在 EAEU 認可體系內可被接受，文件通常須以俄文提供。

mandatory_status.target: Supporting requirement — photobiological risk-group classification (GOST IEC 62471) documented within the EAC safety technical file under the TR CU 004/2011 luminaire safety route
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — TR CU 004/2011 framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification for LED products in Armenia is assessed against GOST IEC 62471 and documented within the EAC safety technical file. The methodology shares the IEC 62471 base with China's GB/T 20145, so a CN assessment can usually be re-expressed for the EAEU framework. CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only; for Armenia the classification should be formally recorded, with RG2/RG3 products requiring additional warnings and usage restrictions. Testing should be acceptable within the EAEU accreditation system and documentation provided in Russian.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 亚美尼亚 LED 产品的光生物危险组别分类依据 GOST IEC 62471 评定，并记录于 EAC 安全技术文件中。其方法与中国 GB/T 20145 共享 IEC 62471 基础，故中国评估通常可为 EAEU 框架重新表述。中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性；对亚美尼亚，分类应正式记录，RG2/RG3 产品须附加警告及使用限制。检测须在 EAEU 认可体系内可被接受，文件以俄文提供。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞美尼亞 LED 產品的光生物危險組別分類依據 GOST IEC 62471 評定，並記錄於 EAC 安全技術文件中。其方法與中國 GB/T 20145 共享 IEC 62471 基礎，故中國評估通常可為 EAEU 框架重新表述。中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性；對亞美尼亞，分類應正式記錄，RG2/RG3 產品須附加警告及使用限制。檢測須在 EAEU 認可體系內可被接受，文件以俄文提供。

requirement_topic.en: Product Marking & Labelling — EAC Mark, Russian-Language Markings vs CN Labels
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标识与标签——EAC 标志、俄文标识 vs 中国标签
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標識與標籤——EAC 標誌、俄文標識 vs 中國標籤

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Armenian / EAEU market must carry the single EAC conformity mark and the markings required by the applicable Technical Regulations: manufacturer and importer identification, model/type, rated voltage and frequency (220/380 V, 50 Hz), rated power, protection class, and relevant safety/photobiological warnings where the product is RG2 or above. Markings and accompanying documentation (user manual, safety information) are typically required in Russian, and an in-country importer registered in the EAEU is identified on the product or packaging. Unlike the EU energy-label regime, the EAEU does not impose a directly equivalent rescaled A-G energy label with a printed blue-light-hazard class as a separate consumer label for lighting; the photobiological classification is handled within the technical file and product safety markings rather than as a mandated EU-style label.
summary.zh: 投放亚美尼亚／EAEU 市场的 LED 灯具须加贴统一 EAC 合格标志及适用技术法规要求的标识：制造商和进口商标识、型号/类型、额定电压和频率（220/380 V、50 Hz）、额定功率、防护等级，以及在产品为 RG2 及以上时的相关安全／光生物警告。标识及随附文件（用户手册、安全信息）通常须以俄文提供，并在产品或包装上标明在 EAEU 注册的进口国进口商。与欧盟能效标签制度不同，EAEU 未对照明强制要求直接等效的重新调整 A-G 能效标签及单独印制蓝光危害等级的消费者标签；光生物分类在技术文件及产品安全标识中处理，而非作为欧盟式强制标签。
summary.zht: 投放亞美尼亞／EAEU 市場的 LED 燈具須加貼統一 EAC 合格標誌及適用技術法規要求的標識：製造商和進口商標識、型號/類型、額定電壓和頻率（220/380 V、50 Hz）、額定功率、防護等級，以及在產品為 RG2 及以上時的相關安全／光生物警告。標識及隨附文件（用戶手冊、安全信息）通常須以俄文提供，並在產品或包裝上標明在 EAEU 註冊的進口國進口商。與歐盟能效標籤制度不同，EAEU 未對照明強制要求直接等效的重新調整 A-G 能效標籤及單獨印製藍光危害等級的消費者標籤；光生物分類在技術文件及產品安全標識中處理，而非作為歐盟式強制標籤。

standards_or_laws: EAC conformity mark and marking requirements under the applicable EAEU Technical Regulations (TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, TR EAEU 037/2016)
EAEU labelling/markings — manufacturer/importer identification and product safety markings, typically in Russian

summary.en: In China, luminaires carry the CCC mark (where in scope), GB-standard ratings markings, and the China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 showing the efficiency grade (1–3). The CEL is an energy label only and does not include a blue-light-hazard class. CN markings and documentation are in Chinese. There is no Russian-language requirement, no EAC mark, and no in-country EAEU importer identification on CN-market products.
summary.zh: 在中国，灯具（在范围内时）加贴 CCC 标志、GB 标准额定值标识及依据 GB 30255 的中国能效标识（CEL），显示能效等级（1–3 级）。CEL 仅为能效标签，不含蓝光危害等级。中国标识及文件以中文提供。中国市场产品无俄文要求、无 EAC 标志，亦无 EAEU 进口国进口商标识。
summary.zht: 在中國，燈具（在範圍內時）加貼 CCC 標誌、GB 標準額定值標識及依據 GB 30255 的中國能效標識（CEL），顯示能效等級（1–3 級）。CEL 僅為能效標籤，不含藍光危害等級。中國標識及文件以中文提供。中國市場產品無俄文要求、無 EAC 標誌，亦無 EAEU 進口國進口商標識。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — China Energy Label for LED room luminaires (efficiency grade only, no blue-light class)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC marking for in-scope luminaires

gap.en: The marking and labelling gap is mainly format and language rather than a missing physical performance: a CN-market luminaire carries the CCC mark and a Chinese-language CEL, while an Armenia-market product must carry the EAC mark, Russian-language safety markings and documentation, and identify a registered in-country EAEU importer. The matching 220/380 V 50 Hz rating means the rated-voltage marking is already correct for Armenia. Unlike the EU, the EAEU does not mandate a separate consumer-facing rescaled A-G energy label with a printed blue-light-hazard class for lighting; the photobiological classification is documented in the technical file and reflected in safety markings/warnings where applicable. Manufacturers must therefore re-artwork packaging and labels for the EAC mark and Russian-language content, and ensure the importer details appear on product/packaging.
gap.zh: 标识与标签差距主要是格式与语言，而非缺失实体性能：中国市场灯具加贴 CCC 标志及中文 CEL，而亚美尼亚市场产品须加贴 EAC 标志、俄文安全标识及文件，并标明在 EAEU 注册的进口国进口商。220/380 V 50 Hz 额定值匹配意味着额定电压标识对亚美尼亚已正确。与欧盟不同，EAEU 未对照明强制要求单独面向消费者的重新调整 A-G 能效标签及印制蓝光危害等级；光生物分类记录于技术文件并在适用时体现于安全标识／警告中。因此制造商须为 EAC 标志及俄文内容重新设计包装和标签，并确保进口商信息出现在产品／包装上。
gap.zht: 標識與標籤差距主要是格式與語言，而非缺失實體性能：中國市場燈具加貼 CCC 標誌及中文 CEL，而亞美尼亞市場產品須加貼 EAC 標誌、俄文安全標識及文件，並標明在 EAEU 註冊的進口國進口商。220/380 V 50 Hz 額定值匹配意味著額定電壓標識對亞美尼亞已正確。與歐盟不同，EAEU 未對照明強制要求單獨面向消費者的重新調整 A-G 能效標籤及印製藍光危害等級；光生物分類記錄於技術文件並在適用時體現於安全標識／警告中。因此製造商須為 EAC 標誌及俄文內容重新設計包裝和標籤，並確保進口商信息出現在產品／包裝上。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC mark plus Russian-language safety markings and importer identification required on the product/packaging under the applicable EAEU Technical Regulations; no EU-style separate A-G energy label with printed blue-light class is mandated for lighting
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC mark (where in scope) and Chinese-language China Energy Label (GB 30255) required; CEL shows efficiency grade only and includes no blue-light-hazard class

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Technical Regulation marking requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Armenia, the marking and labelling change is mainly format and language: the EAC mark, Russian-language safety markings and documentation, and a registered in-country EAEU importer identification replace the CN CCC mark and Chinese-language China Energy Label. The matching 220/380 V 50 Hz rating means the rated-voltage marking is already correct. Unlike the EU, the EAEU does not mandate a separate consumer A-G energy label with a printed blue-light-hazard class for lighting; the photobiological classification is documented in the technical file. Manufacturers should re-artwork packaging for the EAC mark and Russian-language content.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对亚美尼亚，标识与标签的变化主要是格式与语言：EAC 标志、俄文安全标识及文件、以及在 EAEU 注册的进口国进口商标识，取代中国 CCC 标志及中文中国能效标识。220/380 V 50 Hz 额定值匹配意味着额定电压标识已正确。与欧盟不同，EAEU 未对照明强制要求单独的消费者 A-G 能效标签及印制蓝光危害等级；光生物分类记录于技术文件中。制造商应为 EAC 标志及俄文内容重新设计包装。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對亞美尼亞，標識與標籤的變化主要是格式與語言：EAC 標誌、俄文安全標識及文件、以及在 EAEU 註冊的進口國進口商標識，取代中國 CCC 標誌及中文中國能效標識。220/380 V 50 Hz 額定值匹配意味著額定電壓標識已正確。與歐盟不同，EAEU 未對照明強制要求單獨的消費者 A-G 能效標籤及印製藍光危害等級；光生物分類記錄於技術文件中。製造商應為 EAC 標誌及俄文內容重新設計包裝。
